{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sata Shrine'''|佐多神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].
